proofRule.rule: A claim may be marked proven only when every required link is present or explicitly not applicable with a reason.

visibleCheck.detail: Dashboard exposes text canon and zero approved visual masters.

workRules.title: Kein grüner Status ohne geschlossene Beweiskette
workRules.effectiveFrom: PR #5 deployment proof mechanism; generalized by this audit

visibleCheck.detail: Historic claims are being reclassified by this audit.

gaps: PR #12 overstated placeholder portraits as production-ready.
Not every early project claim had an artifact and visible countercheck.

workRules.title: Unfreigegebene Visuals dürfen keine Figur repräsentieren

visibleCheck.detail: Corrective deployment must remove all four placeholder portraits from the live character board.

gaps: The live dashboard still displayed technical SVG placeholders before this correction.
workRules.correction: Hide all technical character SVGs and show the locked identifiers, forbidden traits and VISUAL OFFEN status instead.

workRules.title: Keine neue Figur, Pilotstory oder Stilrichtung während M1R

visibleCheck.detail: Dashboard and Director expose only the locked EP001 path.

workRules.title: Recovery liest Quellen nur und schreibt ausschließlich Reports

deployRefs.reason: Local filesystem scanner is not a public runtime feature.

visibleCheck.detail: Read-only behavior is verified by isolated filesystem tests.

workRules.title: Nur Pagebabe/comic verändern; Chris Fact Radar bleibt tabu

deployRefs.reason: Repository isolation is a change-control property.

visibleCheck.detail: The Comic repository alone cannot cryptographically prove that another repository was never modified.

gaps: A complete cross-repository audit would require independent history access to every protected repository.

workRules.title: Merge nur nach grüner Comic Factory CI
artifactRefs: workflow artifacts for M1 and timing

visibleCheck.detail: CI evidence is workflow-based rather than visual.

gaps: Early repository history before PR #3 is not covered by the current merge gate.

workRules.title: Kein Visual Master ohne menschliche Sichtprüfung

visibleCheck.detail: Dashboard reports 0/4 character masters and 0/4 set masters.

claims.title: Comic Factory Dashboard is publicly reachable
deployRefs: issue #11 with URL, commit, workflow and timestamp

visibleCheck.detail: Public HTML and project artifacts are retrievable.

claims.title: The deterministic M1 media pipeline works

visibleCheck.detail: Public MP4 and render report exist. Character, room and voice remain placeholders.

claims.title: Legacy creative and production inventory is preserved

visibleCheck.detail: Dashboard exposes the 13-character legacy library in a collapsed section.

claims.title: Four core character text bibles are locked
testRefs: age, role and speech drift tests in scripts/check.mjs

visibleCheck.detail: Dashboard reports Text-Canon 4/4.

claims.title: Local recovery found no trustworthy visual master

deployRefs.reason: Local absolute paths and private inventory are intentionally not published.

visibleCheck.detail: The 20-image review bundle was visually checked and fully rejected as unrelated influencer imagery.

gaps: The complete local report is intentionally not committed, so third parties cannot reproduce the exact 6,047-file result from GitHub alone.

claims.title: Four character briefs and four location briefs are ready

visibleCheck.detail: Dashboard reports Visual-Briefs 8/8 while keeping masters at zero.
Dashboard reports 8/8 planned panels and 45.5 seconds.

claims.title: EP001 timing and subtitle package passes the 17 CPS gate

visibleCheck.detail: Timing report shows pacingStatus pass and maximum 16.61 CPS.

claims.title: The repaired production dashboard is visually clean
testRefs: DOM markers and application contract tests

visibleCheck.detail: A new human screenshot after PR #27 has not yet been audited.

gaps: Structural and deployment proof do not replace a fresh visual screenshot review.

claims.title: The four SVG portraits represent the planned characters

visibleCheck.detail: Ricco SVG lacks the required full-body silhouette, oversized backpack, Tupperware anchor and bright new sneakers.

gaps: The SVGs were technical placeholders, not plan-faithful character designs.
claims.correction: Do not display these SVGs as character portraits. Keep them only as technical test assets.

claims.title: Four character master references are approved

visibleCheck.detail: Approved count is 0/4.

gaps: No approved Ricco, Basti, Jule or Don Miau master reference exists.

claims.title: Four pilot location master references are approved

visibleCheck.detail: Approved count is 0/4.

gaps: No approved facade, room, hall or kitchen master exists.

claims.title: Ricco, Basti and Jule voices are approved
testRefs: timing report forbids automatic voice approval

visibleCheck.detail: Approved count is 0/3.

claims.title: Eight approved animatic panel images exist

visibleCheck.detail: Approved count is 0/8.

gaps: Blueprint exists, panel images do not.

claims.title: A finished EP001 episode exists

visibleCheck.detail: Only the four-second technical M1 proof exists.

gaps: Character masters, set masters, voices, panel images, animatic render and final QC are missing.

incidents.detectedBy: User visual review and retroactive canon comparison
incidents.problem: Technical SVG placeholders were described and displayed as production-ready character assets even though they did not satisfy the locked character plans.
incidents.impact: The live dashboard visually implied characters that were not the planned cast designs.
correctiveActions: Hide all technical SVGs from character identity cards.
Show required identifiers and forbidden traits instead.
Make CI reject visual-master claims while master references are null.
Require a visible countercheck before a visual claim becomes proven.

incidents.problem: Accidental duplicate and comparison pull requests were created during recovery work.
incidents.impact: Noise in project history and increased risk of merging the wrong branch.
correctiveActions: Both PRs were closed without merge.
Subsequent work used one isolated branch and one PR per change.

incidents.problem: A 244-commit backend-adapter draft predates the current canon and production gate and remains open.
incidents.impact: It can be mistaken for active architecture despite being superseded by the evidence-first production line.
correctiveActions: Do not merge into the active line.
Close after the audit record is merged.
